current_suggestion.channel_name: EP Wealth Advisors (with Ben Felix-style rigor — try 'The Plain Bagel' instead)
current_suggestion.pitch: The Plain Bagel (Richard Coffin) covers evidence-based personal finance and investing with the same data-first skepticism Ben Felix brings, but focuses more on behavioral traps, monetary concepts, and macroeconomic literacy — areas that connect your interest in Bitcoin and monetary policy to mainstream finance critique. Where Ben Felix leans heavily on factor investing and academic citations, Coffin spends more time interrogating why popular financial narratives fail and how inflation, debt, and monetary systems actually work in practice. Format is solo explainer, 10–20 minutes, scripted and precise without being dry.

history: TEDx Talks – Russ Roberts (EconTalk host solo appearances)
